description_long: This sculpture features a bust of a man with short hair, mounted atop a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The pedestal is inscribed with Cyrillic text, including the name 'ГЮНА ИВАНОВИЧ' and dates, suggesting it is a commemorative monument. The bust and pedestal are rendered in a dark, likely granite or bronze material, giving the piece a solemn and dignified appearance. The base of the sculpture is surrounded by a textured platform that mimics natural ground, adorned with patches of green and pink, possibly representing grass and flowers. The overall form is monolithic and imposing, with clean, sharp edges on the pedestal and a realistic, detailed bust. The sculpture is designed to be viewed from the front, where the inscription and facial features are most visible.
description: A commemorative bust of a man on a tall, inscribed stone pedestal, set on a textured base with floral accents.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the tall, unadorned pedestal, with the textured base visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the smooth, rectangular side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the detailed face of the bust and the Cyrillic inscription on the pedestal, with floral accents at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bust's profile and the clean, flat side of the pedestal, with some floral details at the base.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of a man with commemorative inscription
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors, surrounded by a textured base that resembles natural ground with floral elements, suggesting a park or memorial setting.
